title: minuartia micrantha
intro: Minuartia micrantha, also known as dwarf rock-cress, is a low-growing, perennial plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Minuartia micrantha can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat minor wounds and skin irritations.
